title: Dubai Ruler Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid calls on residents to raise UAE flag across homes, buildings
summary_full: Dubai's ruler, Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum, has urged citizens and residents to proudly display the UAE flag on homes and buildings. This initiative, a tradition marking national unity and pride, aims to foster a collective sense of belonging. The widespread visual display reinforces the nation's founding values and shared future, connecting its diverse population.
